version_description: Hi this is a piano version, i haven’t tried it on the guitar so if it sounds wrong i’m sorry, it will work on the piano by just using root chords.

versions.version_description: Concert pitch made for piano play Eb in 2nd inversion.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Ebm[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]
I fell by the wayside like everyone else[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
I hate you, I hate you, I hate you but I was just kidding myself[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cm[/ch]
Our every moment, I start to replace[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Ab[/ch]
'Cause now that they're gone, all I hear are the words that I needed to say[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]
When you hurt under the surface[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                            [ch]Cm[/ch]
Like troubled water running cold[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Ab[/ch]
Well, time can heal but this won't[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Ebm[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Cm[/ch]
Was there something I could've said[/tab]

To make your heart beat better?
[tab]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
If only I'd have known you had a storm to weather[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Ebm[/ch]          [ch]Gm[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cm[/ch]
Was there something I could've said[/tab]

To make it all stop hurting?
[tab]     [ch]Ab[/ch]
It kills me how your mind can make you feel so worthless[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bbm[/ch]           [ch]Ebm[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab] [ch]Ebm[/ch]
Was never the right time, whenever you called[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gm[/ch]
Went little by little by little until there was nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cm[/ch]
Our every moment, I start to replay[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Ab[/ch]
But all I can think about is seeing that look on your face[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]Ebm[/ch]
When you hurt under the surface[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]                     [ch]Cm[/ch]
Like troubled water running cold[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Ab[/ch]
Well, time can heal but this won't[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cm[/ch]
Was there something I could've said[/tab]

To make your heart beat better?
[tab]    [ch]Ab[/ch]
If only I'd have known you had a storm to weather[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Ebm[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cm[/ch]
Was there something I could've said[/tab]

To make it all stop hurting?
[tab]   [ch]Abm[/ch]
It kills me how your mind can make you feel so worthless[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Ebm[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]                            [ch]Gm[/ch]
Would we be better off by now[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Cm[/ch]
If I'd have let my walls come down?[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Ab[/ch]
Maybe, I guess we'll never know[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
You know, you know[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]        [ch]Gm[/ch]
Before you go[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Cm[/ch]
Was there something I could've said[/tab]

To make your heart beat better?
[tab]     [ch]Ab[/ch]
If only I'd have known you had a storm to weather[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Ebm[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cm[/ch]
Was there something I could've said[/tab]

To make it all stop hurting?
[tab]    [ch]Ab[/ch]
It kills me how your mind can make you feel so worthless[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Ebm[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]
